name: TriLinc Global Impact Fund LLC
business: The Company makes impact investments in Small and Medium Enterprises primarily in developing economies to achieve competitive financial returns and positive measurable impact.

catalysts.event: Court approval of restructuring plan for Compania Argentina de Granos (CAGSA).
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, the court approved the restructuring plan.

catalysts.event: Expected finalization of Dock Brasil sale.
catalysts.sentence: expected to be finalized during the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Next hearing in Trustco legal proceedings.
catalysts.sentence: The next hearing set for June 2026.

catalysts.event: Next deadline in Sancor concurso proceeding.
catalysts.sentence: setting the next deadline in May 2026.
